name: Wightprincess
desc: This card's name becomes "Skull Servant" while in the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Wightprince" from your Deck to the GY. (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; all monsters currently on the field lose ATK/DEF equal to their own Level/Rank x 300, until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: This card's name becomes "Skull Servant" while in the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Wightprince" from your Deck to the GY. (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; all monsters currently on the field lose ATK/DEF equal to their own Level/Rank x 300, until the end of this turn.
eff: This card's name becomes "Skull Servant" while in the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Wightprince" from your Deck to the GY. (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; all monsters currently on the field lose ATK/DEF equal to their own Level/Rank x 300, until the end of this turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
stat_change: Changes own name while in the GY
